messages.content: Facts are sacroscant opinion is free

You are the most intelligent man.. I ever met.. 

So, you no need to update yourself. But we or our group are not eligible or capable to have so intelligent man. Infact you are not made for this planet.

Basic tenet of constitution is freedom of expression which u people cannot maintain and then argue about protecting the very constitution u violate
Nothing new actually this is exactly what left minded and trade union mindset makes u do

Plz don't wait. I don't think you can justify. You need to prepare atleast on rules and regulations laid by indian constitution to continue in group. It's not possible to give so much time to you. And we are not here to teach abcd...z 

When your mindset is to argue without any evidence or concrete basics, it's total waste of time and energy.
I was waiting for u as per our last discussion
Why don't you find some time and come to my office
Trade unions also wanted to save businesses ended up killing them u guys r on the same path and most unwilling to listen to any sane advise
Yr intentions may be good (debatable) but yr actions are destructive and will kill the very education u claim that u want to save.
Basically anyone who disagrees is bip bip bip

Not all but greedy and corrupt are actually very clever and when do blindfold of currency, their greed turns them to become fool. 

Any one can establish his foolishness. Overconfident and over powered do such repeated mistakes. But one right person as opponent can put them down and make them regret

You check for yourselves. Judges are not fools and even though if they are fool, constitution cannot be fool anyone. Judge sanjib banerjee given order and then he was transfered by the powerful govt and allies. But he is the best judge we have ever seen. And then bought the most corrupted ipm on the chair, who tried his level best to dilute the judgement. But the constitution is so well sytemised that he cannot. So he kept pending the case with no hearings since long. Then sc given deadline, so he under forced circumstances kept the hearing and without listening he just said to resolve with social remedies. Now, this is foolishness, in haste and greed he did so wrong. Now look what happens. Just wait and watch

We want to bring education which is missing under the grave of money. We want good teachers who are well paid not under paid. We want school is enough for academics. Children must not need tutors at home. After 7 hrs schooling, then we don't need next 8 hrs children engaged with art and kraft, mother busy getting projects completed, children taking tuitions. No time for heath and sports. No time for self assessment. Only running a directionless show. 

Want to come out of this. 3 hours of good study is enough for anyone to achieve best in academics. Sports equally important and leadership qualities is must
Let the school alike factory die or mend their ways and turn to npo or reasonable profit institution.  Not blackmailers

School is not business. Aapko nikaalke theek Kiya. Aap thoda update karke aao. Fir baat kare toh behetar hai. 

Aap ke liye trade union, factory, business aur school sab ek hai right. 

Kindly apne baccho ko factory naa bheje, school bheje. School ko factory naa samjhe
Toh kya aap nikaloge ghar se ya fir sabko nikal doge

Not at all. If my child is studying there, she or he has fundamental rights to continue her/his education free of coat uphill class viii. And central govt will pay for this on EWC quota. 

The 25% ews quota is mandatory to obtain license for opening school. 

Now  thus payment should be claimed from govt  and govt will pay this. 

Now, if school claims this amount, the govt will not honor those unwarranted fee amount and will be disputed, so they may face consequences on all 100% of revenue. So, it's Allie with all powers and departments to not to admit on ews quota and manage the affairs
Judges are fools
Forget 17000 vs 100 u went to hc and sc what happened
U guys want to do the same to education
And pls see the condition of business die to trade unions
All the points u r raising is similar to what trade unions raise against business
Bilkul nahi rakhna then pls take that 1st step

Correct. Third class institution mein nahi rakhna hai. Bilkul nahi rakhna hai. 

Toh kya use grant milna chaiye? Humara tax ka paise use jaane chaiye? Wo kare toh theek, aur hum kare to criminal? Kya Hume bhi chori karne ki azaadi hai? Partho ko kyun pakda.. ? Tmc ko kya aap ki jarurat hai, as critics dept.? Apna credential toh dijiye? Agar 17000 log kych 100 logo se aisi umeed karenge ki unko importance diya jaaye, toh kya aap de paayenge. Discipline aur rules toh hai apne yahan. Aapko kya rules or discipline se nafrat hai, school nahi maane toh unse pyaar, hum maane toh humse nafrat? 

Problem kya hai aapki? Sochiye Agar aapke ghar mein 6 log apne apne man ki karne lag jaaye toh kya ho. Koi toh rule hoga, bhai jitni kamai Utne kharch.. din mein jagna raat so sona. Bado ka samman, choto ka aadar.. ye sab ki jagah Agar bade aapse paise lootne lag jaaye aur extort kare? Toh kya apne baccho ko leke khali haath nikal jaayenge.  Na unhe samjhayenge, divorce leke during saadi karenge, na samjhayenge. Baccho ko nikaal denge, naa samjhayenge. 

Aakhir kya karenge? Isi liye, school ko samjha rahe hai ki looto magar utna hi jitna hum lootwa sake... jyada zaatati theek nahi
The school in which ur chikd  is studying has a Monopoly over u as long as thr child is in that schoool

1. Who is complaining on monopoly? Who said it's monopoly? 

Schools are not monopoly at all. There are too many schools. It's syndicate of private schools to loot money. 

So, your first Para is again out of the box. 

There are too many group agitating against schools. We are not the only one. And we are abided by the rules and regulations and work on social ethics. So I said we will seek explanation of your removal. So, no point in taking so much pains. Also if the explanation is justified, then we have rights to remove you. 

Atleast your fault is your comparing Saint with criminals and contemnors. 

Do we take any money from you. Do we have any obligations from you? Are we liable for any such acts , so that we must take you along? But however, we seek explanation,  and if you did a little good for us, plz come forward and give supportings so that we can justify why you should be there in the group?
Aap logon ka jo schools ke liye opinion hai waise jagah pe kyu rakhna apne bachhe ko
Reg yr points 1 to 5 i want to ask u a simple Q aisa bekar 3rd grade institutions mein kyu rakhna hai apna bachha ko
Again the 2nd point also shows monopolistic behaviour.

1 simple point u need to answer 1st

U r complaining against schools Monopoly and showing same monopolistic behaviour in the group by blocking my voice.

U think u hv done some great favour by not removing me from the group and hv beem very magnanimous in allowing me to remain in the group but blocking me from commenting

We were all engaged with the court hearing and all other post mortem of the order. This week uphill Sunday, we are busy. After that I will discuss about you and make sure you join. 

But your very early making the idea or judgement is not maturity. And there are 17000 people in the group, you are one out of them. Atleast I am personally taking up the matter. And so you are able to write me. So, the claims or the allegations you are making is baseless and foolishness. I am observing you since years, no one removed you. Earlier also you made too many critics but we never removed you. Many new members joined and we work in a frame work. If I make you join, it will not be good for us. Let us the remover justify with explanation of your removal. Few points to your notice:-

1. Can you talk to govt. And approach or have an opportunity to discuss as you are doing since so many years. But only small removal is so much an issue. 

2. If schools are good, why they are not refunding despite the jso report. Have you hobe through the JSO report ?

3. How you are satisfied with the working of educational institute? Atleast 5 points? 

4. Either the RTE is bogus and the rule should be soiled. Or the school should be as per rule? How both can prevail? 

5. Your home must be having some discipline and let consider it a rule. Now, what will happen if some pawanji in your home says that we cannot home without kids, so no rule or discipline for them. Let the home be the house of criminals, mafias or whatever. Think your country as your home.

Atleast this 5 points straight and simple answer in awaited.
This is what communism is all about
Aapk log ek group mein counterveiw allow nahi karte hai transparency maintain nahi kar paate Sara gyan school owners ke liye
I still remained block while mentors of the group make tall claims about ethics and morality and transparency

U see all my comments i hv been absolutely logical with no personal attacks no name calling no abuse no harsh words harsh facts and strong opinion of course but nothing unparlimentary and yet remain blocked
I continue to remain restrcited from commenting and whoever has blocked me will go out in the world and give lectures on ethics and morals and freedom of expression/speech
Ha ha
Won't get a maid for 10k
A driver comes for 15/18k
To best of schools in kol we pay 10/12k per month on annualised basis even with 100 pc margin they can at best make 10k per child

British were outsiders 
Demonetisation and education cnanot find any link did govt did close down rbi
I stay at auckand square  close to la marts girls  happy to meet and discuss
We will have debate across the table, where I need to come just inform me. I stay in behala parnasree. Any convenient point will be welcome

Your conception is wrong. When you agitated against British, British never left, long years of protest and fight they were forced to leave the country. That never collapsed the industry or system. It was more better and stronger. 

Similarly, the demonitisation. Now, more strong economy and cash less system. 

Can place more than 50 such examples. 

They are not thekedaar of Education. Actually they only are the medium of affiliation, rest all d9ne at home tuition. So their contribution towards education is zero. What we have is only social stature,  what the middle class feels they should have. But this is illusion
Militant approach will kill education in bengal the same way trade unions killed industry
Whatever is write i strongly feel and believe in it.
I think we shud hv a live debate on this over zoom with a larger and wider participation
Thanks but to have right leadership qualities we need everyone's opinion
I appreciate yr taking things sportingly and positively.
I m not able.to reply
You can now call each other and see information such as Active Status and when you've read messages.

Never blocked you lohiaji.  I appreciate your critics. We should take critics sportingly.  

I will check who blocked you. [If blocked]

Again you can enter. I need to verify the facts.

You are our marg darshak
U block my ability to repsond and call yrself 100.pc.ethical.
U block my ability to repsond and call yrself 100.pc.ethical.
U block my ability to repsond and call yrself 100.pc.ethical.
